prompt: Add a pure function named `clampPositive(n: number): number` to apps/backend/src/backend/core/math.ts that returns Math.max(0, n). Also create a co-located test file math.test.ts using bun:test. Run `bun test apps/backend/src/backend/core/math.test.ts` and confirm it passes. Commit nothing.
success_criteria: Both files exist at the exact paths and bun test passes

prompt: Run `bun biome check .` in the repo root and fix any violations in apps/backend/src only. Do not touch node_modules or .claude/. Report a one-line summary of what you changed.
success_criteria: biome check exits 0 on apps/backend/src after your changes

prompt: The user wants to add a feature: 'rate-limit the /health endpoint to 10 req/min per IP'. Produce a 3-5 step vertical-slice decomposition following the Functional Core / Imperative Shell architecture described in AGENTS.md. Each slice must specify which layer (core, infra, shell) it touches. Do not write code — produce only a numbered list.
success_criteria: Output is a numbered markdown list of 3-5 steps, each naming a layer (core|infra|shell)
